name: codex-hud
description: HUD-style status visibility for Codex sessions with setup, doctor, and status commands.

interface.longDescription: Codex HUD brings model/context/usage/git/activity visibility to Codex via status line and command views.
defaultPrompt: Run codex-hud setup and configure a status line.
Show codex-hud status output for the current session.
Run codex-hud doctor and explain any issues.
